creator: tcberner@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 181652
Update py-sip and py-qt[45]

kde@ would like to ask for an exp-run to update py-sip to 4.19.2, py-qt4 to 4.12 and py-qt5 to 5.7.1.

The patch is attached, and can also be found here:
http://people.freebsd.org/~tcberner/patches/pyqt-update.v1.diff
